epics.title: Separate deterministic evidence from musical adjudication

tasks.title: Define script and agent responsibilities
acceptance_criteria: The skill states that scripts measure evidence and never authoritatively select final chords, form, meter level, or extensions.
The agent owns metrical-level selection, provisional form, functional labels, recurrence consensus, inversions, extensions, and unresolved ambiguity.
External chord charts are optional corroboration with explicit provenance and cannot silently override source-audio evidence.
done_definition: Detailed evidence and adjudication fields live in a directly linked artifact contract.

tasks.title: Specify reusable evidence artifacts
acceptance_criteria: Evidence includes tempo-level and beat-grid hypotheses, source-specific chroma, bass candidates, chord candidates, recurrence descriptors, warnings, and provenance.
Candidate artifacts include do_not_select_automatically set to true and preserve at least two plausible options for uncertain segments.
Evidence strength is distinct from agent-assigned decision confidence.
done_definition: The contract includes concrete standalone JSON examples and invariants.
Existing module-mode form coordinates remain supported.

tasks.title: Make audio preprocessing portable
acceptance_criteria: Preprocessing resolves ffmpeg and ffprobe from PATH and common package-manager locations.
When ffprobe is unavailable, supported Python audio metadata provides a safe inspection fallback.
Failures report actionable missing-tool or unsupported-format diagnostics.
done_definition: Automated tests cover direct discovery and fallback behavior.

tasks.title: Implement harmony evidence extraction
acceptance_criteria: The script extracts multiple tempo-level hypotheses, beat-grid candidates, key hypotheses, source-specific chroma, low-register bass candidates, and multiple chord candidates.
The script emits evidence only and never emits a final harmony analysis or selected chord.
Extension candidates receive a complexity penalty unless their added tones have stable source support.
The script accepts a harmonic stem and full mix separately and remains usable with the full mix alone.
done_definition: A deterministic JSON artifact is produced from a short audio fixture and the supplied MP3.
Every candidate segment is explicitly marked as non-authoritative.

tasks.title: Strengthen validators and tests
acceptance_criteria: Validation rejects candidate evidence that appears authoritative, lacks multiple hypotheses where required, or conflates evidence support with final confidence.
Unit tests cover metrical ambiguity, candidate preservation, extension restraint, and preprocessing fallback.
The final analysis validator remains backward compatible with standalone and module artifacts.

tasks.title: Exercise the skill on realistic audio
acceptance_criteria: The supplied recording yields both approximately 70 BPM and double-time alternatives without the script choosing between them.
Evidence contains plausible E-flat-major and C-minor key hypotheses plus multiple chord candidates.
The installed Codex skill is synchronized from the repository source after validation.
done_definition: The generated evidence is reviewed without using the prior final chart as hidden ground truth.
Skill source and installed copy report no drift.

assumptions: The active Python environment provides numpy, librosa, scipy, and soundfile for evidence extraction; the script must fail clearly when optional dependencies are missing.
Demucs remains optional and stem separation is not embedded into the evidence extractor.
No rendered product UI or production data is changed.
The supplied MP3 is a validation input and is not committed.
risks: Numeric chord templates can over-label sevenths and major qualities when vocals or dense arrangements dominate the chroma.
Beat trackers can return half-time or double-time pulses and miss the first downbeat.
Adding too much automated smoothing could recreate an authoritative chord-answerer despite the intended boundary.
Environment-specific multimedia tools may exist outside PATH.
